metadata.ogTitle: LaCie Rugged RAID Pro 4TB Review: A Tough HDD Built for Speed
metadata.twitter:creator: @tomshardware
metadata.og:title: LaCie Rugged RAID Pro 4TB Review: A Tough HDD Built for Speed
metadata.ogDescription: LaCie’s Rugged RAID Pro is a fast external HDD built to take on the elements, has an integrated UHS-II SC card reader, and comes with a data recovery protection plan.
metadata.article:author: https://www.tomshardware.com/author/sean-webster
metadata.og:description: LaCie’s Rugged RAID Pro is a fast external HDD built to take on the elements, has an integrated UHS-II SC card reader, and comes with a data recovery protection plan.
